android.title: Flower Forest - Word Puzzle
android.summary: Dreamlike puzzle game where you combine objects to solve surreal mysteries.
android.description:
🌙 Step into a strange dream world… where every object hides a secret.

Flower Forest - Word Puzzle is a relaxing puzzle game and point-and-click puzzle adventure where you explore mysterious spaces, interact with hidden objects, and combine them to uncover clever solutions.

No words. No voice. Just pure intuition.

Each level is designed as a brain teaser that can be solved through logic and observation — no complex calculations, no note-taking. Discover hidden clues, connect objects, and unlock new areas in this calming mystery puzzle game.

🧩 Game Features:
Intuitive Puzzle Design
A satisfying mix of logic puzzles, hidden object games, and object-combining mechanics.

Surreal Dream Atmosphere
Explore a relaxing, monochrome world inspired by abstract dreams and mystery escape games.

Hints Available
Get helpful hints to guide you through challenging brain puzzles.

Short & Relaxing
Enjoy 1–2 hours of puzzle-solving experience.

🌍 Accessible for Everyone:
🔇 Non-verbal gameplay – enjoy without language barriers
⚫ No color-based puzzles – clean monochrome design
🔕 No voice required – play anytime, anywhere

✨ Can you solve every puzzle and uncover the hidden secrets?
Download now and enjoy a relaxing puzzle adventure filled with mystery, logic, and discovery.
android.recentChanges:
Ver 0.6.0
- Update new levels
- Fix Bugs

ios.title: Flower Forest - Word Puzzle
ios.description:
Step into a strange dream world… where every object hides a secret.

Flower Forest - Word Puzzle is a relaxing puzzle game and point-and-click puzzle adventure where you explore mysterious spaces, interact with hidden objects, and combine them to uncover clever solutions. 

No words. No voice. Just pure intuition.

Each level is designed as a brain teaser that can be solved through logic and observation — no complex calculations, no note-taking. Discover hidden clues, connect objects, and unlock new areas in this calming mystery puzzle game.

 Game Features:
Intuitive Puzzle Design
A satisfying mix of logic puzzles, hidden object games, and object-combining mechanics.

Surreal Dream Atmosphere
Explore a relaxing, monochrome world inspired by abstract dreams and mystery escape games.

Hints Available
Get helpful hints to guide you through challenging brain puzzles.

Short & Relaxing
Enjoy 1–2 hours of puzzle-solving experience. 

 Accessible for Everyone:
 Non-verbal gameplay – enjoy without language barriers
 No color-based puzzles – clean monochrome design
 No voice required – play anytime, anywhere

 Can you solve every puzzle and uncover the hidden secrets? 
Download now and enjoy a relaxing puzzle adventure filled with mystery, logic, and discovery.

Were it not for the fact that I could not play the game without paying for ad free, It would be a 5 star game. At first I couldn't even start the game for the ads. Extremely annoying as I like to listen to other things while playing the game (music, books, podcasts, etc.) Every time I'd come back into the game after playing or pausing my secondary app, an ad would play. Love the puzzles, though!

I have ad blocker, so I don't have any big issues with ads. I was expecting it to have some sort of plot line but it's really just finding a few random letters each puzzle, with the goal of making a cluster of flowers bloom. Unfortunately, the levels start to repeat at about level 60 or so, and it gets sort of pointless after that. Still, the puzzles themselves are creative and at times challenging which makes for a good time passing game.

I love the aesthetic and seeing a flower bloom whenever I (finally) solve a puzzle. I agree with other reviwers that the ad frequency is annoying. But also where's the story? You solve the very first puzzle to get into the house and that's it. Then the puzzles only make flowers bloom. (Not bad but that gets boring, you know?)
I loved the game design and the music. It had a nice feel of problem solving. The only reason it's not a full 5 stars, is that the puzzles begin to circulate rather than continuous new puzzles.

1) ADS. Ads before you even start the game! Ads at the bottom of the page! Ads between every level! 2) no instructions, you're just groping around looking for letter codes that, if you get them right, make a blue lily of the valley bloom. no idea why you're doing it, no clue how you got here, just do it type gameplay.
it's okay, it's a rip off of her trees and the puzzles after a while just repeats after that it's not fun anymore.

I paid for ad free, meant to get rid of all ads banner ads and all, money came out, played one round then hit with 3 back to back ads, thought maybe a bug, close app and restart it, hit with another ad before the game even finishes launching, going to be asking for a refund for sure
Bought the no ads but I still get ads... I would like a refund or a game that actually functions as it's supposed to do.
not working
doesn't give you the hints no matter how many times you watch an ad to get it
Decent game play, but keeps asking for data consent to force you to give your full consent. feels like dark pattern. As well as way to long/many ads.

Ads everywhere! As soon as you open the game, there's an ad in your face, once that's over, there's a banner ad along the bottom, an ad on-screen in the settings menu, an ad after every single level, which can be quite short, and you have to watch 2-3 MORE ads just to get a hint! You can't even see the gameplay through all of the capitalistic garbage. -19/10, not worth your time!

I don't leave reviews often but this game is horrible! DONT WASTE YOUR TIME! It's a simple and fun looking concept until you get into it n discover there's no storyline, the levels are nearly impossible to solve and even the hints you pay for make no sense. And the ads take forever plus 6-9 clicks to get out of. I really wanted to like this game. I couldn't be more disappointed. Come on Devs, you really dropped the ball on this one. 🤬🤢

You can't even get through the initial load screen without an ad popup. It forces you to touch a button at the top to skip the ad and move on to the game. Then it doesn't give you the option to access the settings to even find out if there's a way to pay to get rid of ads, and you're stuck playing the first part with an ugly banner at the bottom ruining what looks like an otherwise lovely game. I uninstalled it after the first few minutes.

Ad central. Could not complete a puzzle without watching several ads, which were inappropriate and irritating. The puzzles were not difficult in what I could play, which made the entire app not worth it in my opinion. Usual methods for getting this problem under control other than paying to remove ads just did not work. Just seemed absurd to continue playing an unplayable, unchallenging game

Great if you don't mind a game with your ads, not ads in your game. An ad plays when you open the app. An ad plays of you swipe down on the notification bar. Ad ad plays when you click on you pop out video player because you clicked outside the app. An ad plays after each level. And the ads often take longer than the actual playtime of the levels themselves. The amount of ads this game has should be criminal, and they're not short—there's like 2-3 each time.

This game is cute and the puzzles are really good. The only bad thing is how many ads there are, like way too many. There are long ads and there are even some that are back to back ehich is personally annoying. Love the art style and game-play. But the amount of ads ruined it for me.

This "game" genuinely seems like it was put together purely as a way to farm ad revenue for the developer. It has no substance or storyline whatsoever. The puzzles aren't even really puzzles half the time, and they don't contribute to any sort of mystery solving as advertised regardless. Furthermore, there are ads constantly running (one of which popped up before the title screen even finished loading), and the art is completely AI generated. I'm not even sure why this is even allowed.

I understand ads, but after the first two puzzles I was getting so many of them, at one point I moved a piece for a clue after an ad break and I got two more ads! Not to mention that there's an ad banner at the bottom. Seems like an okay premise but devs, you gotta make the ads less intrusive and the game slightly more playable. I uninstalled it almost immediately after trying to play for half an hour.

The number of ads makes this game unplayable. I like to listen to podcasts or music while I play games. At the end of a level, an ad plays, which is fine, but the ad stops what I'm listening to, and it doesn't start again once the ad ends. When I go to restart it, another ad plays. This cycle repeats, meaning I can't listen to what I want or get to the next level without closing the app and opening it again. Not worth the aggravation. I've uninstalled the game.

From the ads I've seen, I was interested at first and enjoy puzzle style media. But when it comes to the game itself, just pure slop. you can't play it offline since the app forces you to have internet so it can bombard you with ads. The game is filled with AI generated images, plus it copies from a game on Steam made with actual passion called "Her Trees: Puzzle Dream." If the developers decided to put some effort into this, the game may have been a genuinely good choice for puzzle lovers.

I really wanted to like this game, but unfortunately it's just fancy dressing over a blatant ad delivery service. An ad loads before the game even starts!! Next, I couldn't get even five (5!!) minutes of uninterrupted gameplay before THREE (3!) interstitial ads popped up back to back - and each one FORCES you to click to the next ad using the button in the top right corner to ensure that you HAVE to pay attention to each ad. You can also forget about offline play - the game simply won't load.

First, the core gameplay is a copy of Her Trees, some puzzles are even DIRECT copies of the game. If you're inspired by it, at least mention the original game! Second, uses A TON of AI generated images, which is ironic for a game about growing flowers. Third, am I playing a game or watching ads? Every few minutes, or every three puzzles, whichever one is faster, ads come up, which is punishing and felt like you're racing against the ads to come up. Overall, do better.

The game is at least 50% ads. It will play the first ad before it's even done loading... After one level, I got hit by 3 different types of full-screen ads in succession. And every time it wants to play another batch, it resets your ad preferences, so you have to go through the song and dance of unchecking all the default data vendors... Absolute joke.

uses ai art. so many ads. ads upon opening the game, banner ads, pop-up ads every 2-3 levels. the game requires internet so you can't escape the ads, then shows you an ad upon reconnection to wifi. the game has a simple premise but is executed sloppily. so much "effort" (ai slop) is used to make the promotional ads for the game to make it seem mysterious, but it has no story or dialogue, just bad puzzles with no instruction or logic or reason for completing them.

I like the puzzles, quite original. I like the graphics and the controls are nimble enough. But how many times do you need to ask for my consent to cookies? I played twice and I was asked 4 times: if you think that I am going to click 'accept all' to avoid deselecting all the toggles, you are wrong. Uninstalling.

The game dynamics itself? Very good. The app? Terrible. It asks you to consent to personalised ads, meaning you have to untick any you don't consent to, literally every time an ad shows. Which is EVERY time you finish a level. And since as the levels are about 1 minute to complete, the ads are overpowering the game. I put up with about 20 mins of game play, but now I am deleting it because I can't be dealing with the ads and consent messages.

Downloaded this because I love Her Trees and wanted a similar game but its almost a replica. Atleast the first few puzzles are, because I could only bear so much lag. I perform 1 action at the most, after which it freezes entirely and I have to shut the app. I know someone has to pay to make free games possible, but all Ive done here is watch ads. Its frozen the rest of the time. Ads on the loading page, ads at the bottom of the screen, ad breaks every few mins. Its too much.

The WORST game I have ever played. I thought it would be a nice puzzle game, but I was WRONG, the art is AI, the puzzles aren't even puzzles, and way too many ads. If you plan on downloading it, don't. It'll be the worst experience you'll have with a puzzle game.

Beautiful game. Artwork and music are great. the puzzles are fun and make you think a little bit. The ads nearly ruin it. Any time an ad pops up, it immediately breaks immersion. Not sure if I will continue playing it and it's solely because of the ads.

The idea is great, art is good... but i watched so many ads every other level. I don't mind ads, but those are loooong and often. And it's poorly optimised since my battery went down fast and started heating up. Just abyssal experience in front of what seems to be a nice puzzle game. Uninstalled, unfortunately.

As much as I think the game idea and vibes are amazing, the atmosphere and graphics are ruined by the AI look. There is no story so despite the eerie feeling and vibe, nothing happens leaving the game feeling bare. I completed all 60 levels in one day and now there is nothing to do. Ads after each level and when loading in, ads take you to the app store making you have to load the game again meaning even more ads. Like the overall idea but has so many flaws.

great puzzles but the amount of ads are obscene. I went through 5 ads with only 1 minute of game play. I mean seriously. it takes 2 or 3 ads just to start the next level and when you are in game if you take more than 10 seconds to answer you get even more ads. I wish I was joking.

The game itself is cute, or it would be if you could play it for more than 30 seconds at a time. The ads are constant and unbearable. They're long, unskippable, force you to go to the app store. The first thing that happens when you open the game is an ad. You don't even get to play first.

Had quite high expectations and genuinely hope it won't be like those app which consists of ads. But incredibly laggy, plus the amount of ads they show rather than the gameplay itself shows it's made strictly for greed not for the passion of games. You can do better. Hoping for the best fixes 👍

It is not working,even the first puzzle didn't work. I pressed the button and it lagged . This game is really the worst, I opened and closed it several times and even did clear data many times and also uninstalled and then installed it but then also it didn't work 😡😡

Don't even waste your time downloading this game. After I downloaded the game and refused all of my personal data being used by unknown companies, one of which wanted to hold my personal data for over 1000 days. There was an AD, I hadn't even had any game play yet. After one challenge, I was asked to reconfirm the use of my personal data, then again another AD. Total waste of my time. You also cannot play this game if you are offline.

So many ads. 1 ad before the game even from finishes loading, I played ONE little mini puzzle, THEN THREE MORE ADS. Sad thing is, it's actually a cute game, I could see myself playing it quite a bit if you weren't watching more ads than playing the game.

its fun in concept but by level 5 it was stupidly hard and the clue wasnt possible to follow becuase you couldn't get the pieces to over lap the way they show. Level 9 is literally impossible. I've used both the clue and the solve hints and when I put in the answer the solve gives me it just resets, and when I watch ANOTHER ad to get ANOTHER solve it shows a different answer. If someone told me that this was ai slop with ai slop for programming I wouldn't be surprised, disappointed maybe.

As soon as I installed, got notice that my Android had 76 viruses. Beware. Update: Apparently that was just one of the scam ads they allow. Ads when the game loads, banner ads during gameplay, and TWO or THREE ads after each level.
lots of freezing. or very laggy. never made it past intro to game in 15 minutes. I gave up. please get rid of the majority of the glitches before you launch a game. this game is unplayable.

This is a game you should not trust. while the game play and puzzles are OK, the game will ask you for Data Preferences every 3d lvl, if you do not accept all. If a game is that desperate for your data, the're up to no good.
there's an ad every like 4 puzzles, and the puzzles are fast. also the first thing I got hit with before the game even started for the first time was an ad. cute game but it's just a money grab game

wayy too much ads, finished the puzzle? ads. going to settings? ads. unlocking your phone and wanting to play? ads. even if you turn off your wifi, it wont work as the game requires wifi. I can't really play it and give it a good rating due to being bombarded with ads
pop up ad while the game was loading, hadn't even played yet. more forced ads after the 3rd level. not even a word game, just picking letters that are found in the level. uninstalled.

A cute game but genuinely unplayable because of how many ads there are. I get an ad popup every 30 seconds, and there are ads constantly at the bottom of the screen. Completely ruins the experience :(
This is not a game. This is an ad farming game and right within the first two minutes I can tell that it only takes the intelligence of a three year old to solve these word puzzles.

the game itself is ok. they do need to give some sort of instructions at the beginning. the level starts and you pretty much have to guess what youre supposed to do. The real problem though, are the ads. They are obnoxious as ever. they are constant and repetitive

neutral.text: a new beautiful game but so much annoying ads
It's a nice game but it's lagging in every 2 seconds , please work on that other wise it's a cute game
The puzzles are fine, some are too abstract but oh well, but the ads ramp up after the first few flowers. Now it's nearly every puzzle.
love the game but the ads make it unbearable,,, can't even play offline
I did enjoy the game, but got stuck on level 35. I used all hints multiple times..I got multiple answers.. Will be uninstalling, bummer.
It's a really cool game but I noticed that this game keeps repeating the same game at different levels. I keep on seeing the same thing.

I would like to give this game 4 or maybe even 5 stars, but that's unrealistic. the puzzles themselves are really fun and engaging. they make you think outside of the box and not just in 2 dimensions. however the flaws i have with this app is the ads. yes you can purchase the ad removal for about$3-$4 USD, not too pricey. the other is the layout of some puzzles being slightly cut off at the bottom because of the layout of the puzzle your solving for and the answer sheet being in a fixed area.

I know it costs money to create these games and run them, but not only do they have constant ads at the bottom of the screen at all times, they have insanely annoying ones after every level. These ads are so long, unskipable, and force you to click on them in order to close them instead of just offering an "x". the ads can vary anywhere from 20 seconds (where you get two unskipable ones) to 50 seconds long. that's nearly a minute of unskipable ads after every. single. 30 second level. insane.

I actually really enjoy this game. To start with it felt like there was no clear direction to go with each level but thats surprisingly what makes it so fun. I do believe there is a bug in level 52. I've been stuck on it for a while now and when I watch an ad to give me the answer its isnt correct and changes the answer each time i rewatch. Thats the reason for three stars at this stage.

Really good game with puzzles challenging enough to be immersive but not that hard enough to quit. But the ads are absolutely so annoying. There's an ad after every level and you cannot load the game without wifi but if you do you can't escape the ads... Promising potential ruined by ads. I know it's kinda new and needs support but we could use less ads. Thank you. Please update soon!❤️‍🩹💜

too many annoying ads (at the bottom, after completing each level & after unlocking the phone when idle... I can't turn off data either (this game uses data to play)😞 I love puzzle-mystery games & I've played a lot of them but i can't seem to enjoyed it. I'm stopped at level 7 it's hard to focus bcs the ads are causing my phone to be hot & drained my battery. I hope developers can reduce the ads for free users. I'm aware of the ads free button tho but I'm not that loaded to spend money on games

Pretty good puzzles, but it loops after 60 levels and the ads make it a little frustrating. If you turn off the wifi, it doesn't let you play the game, but if you turn on the wifi briefly then turn it off after the level starts, it bypasses it, so take that as you will.

this is not the kinda game I thought it was plus the game is like 80% adds! I literally clicked an X to close a tab and sent me on 3 ads. not worth the gaming. plus there is no explanation for some of the puzzles so it forces you to watch MORE ads to use a clue..

Great game, works really well and has genuinely fun puzzles. But far too many ads. Requires you to keep your internet on to play but then you're bombarded with ads every 2-3 levels. Great game besides that.

Too basic but at the same time too complicated. absolutely no story. no explanations of how anything works. no clues unless you spend money or watch ads. wonky fonts that get very difficult to decipher. one single song track that repeats every 30ish seconds.
